artPrompt: A tense widescreen film-still of townsfolk clustered around a folding table on a sunlit green, fists clenched and faces flushed mid-argument, one finger jabbing emphatically at a small pile of blank slips while others count on their fingers; golden afternoon light rakes across heated expressions and drifting dust, picket fences and a restless crowd dissolving into haze behind, civic fervor curdling, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: We Demand a Recount
text:
If the table is currently voting, recount the votes: each player counts their votes again, out loud, slowly. You may have one Voter you control vote twice during this recount.
Otherwise, draw a card and create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (You demanded a recount of nothing. Procedure was followed.)
flavorText: "That can't be right." "It's the same number." "Count it AGAIN."
